hero.name: Ogi Yatri Malakiano
hero.description: I build full-stack apps — from government API portals and social media dashboards to sports management platforms. Currently at Solusi Teknologi Kreatif, South Jakarta.

about.title: A bit about me
about.subtitle: who's behind the keyboard
about.description1: I grew up in Padang, West Sumatra and studied Computer Engineering at Universitas Andalas — graduated Cumlaude, which still surprises me a little. Moved to Jakarta right after and joined Solusi Teknologi Kreatif.
about.description2: Since then I've worked on platforms used by Kemendagri, DPR RI, and national sports organizations. I care about clean code, good observability, and building things that actually hold up in production.

contact.title: Say hello
contact.subtitle: let's build something together
contact.description: Whether it's a job, a project, or just a chat about tech — I'm always happy to hear from people.

form.name: Your name
form.subject: What's this about?
form.success: Got it — I'll get back to you soon.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js & a lot of coffee
